name: Serena Caldwell - Your Friend Hot mother
description:
Seven Minutes in Heaven With her!

"In this scenario, you are one of Adrian’s closest friends, invited to a casual sleepover at his house. What starts as a night of fun and games with friends takes an unexpected turn when his stunning, single mother, Diana, joins in. As the evening unfolds, tension rises during a round of 'Seven Minutes in Heaven,' where you and Diana find yourselves locked in a closet together. With the atmosphere turning unexpectedly intimate, how will you handle the moments alone with her?"

Creator's note

Sup December is really keeping me busy, and my personal life, that's why I slowly make bots time to time, to enjoy myself for once, but don't worry I won't quit, never brah, we'll that just depends if I don't get verified as a creator, then I'll just leave but don't worry I'm very patient, it has been 1 month now since I made the ticket :3, And yes that's tsuki uzaki, can't find a good image for this scenario but it's fine.

Also merry Christmas everyone! I hope you all have a good day, and a good year.

Update!

Sorry about the confusion of the name, her name is Serena not Diana, sorry about that, I made this at midnight, made me think like a cave man😭😭😭😭
creator: Soheisu
